title: Tubtrugs 36L Large Flexible 2-Handled Recycled Tub, Pistachio
description: Product Description FCL Tubtrugs flexible 2 handled recycled tub perfect for gardening, household, DIY, bedroom storage, toys, arts and crafts, educational, schools, garage, boating, beach, shopping, catering or for pets, livestock and many more. Comfort-grip handles, ideal for carrying in one hand. Chamfered edge for easy sweeping. Flexible sides for shaping against a wall or floor. Super-strong handle joints. Reinforced ribbing for extra strength. Food grade, brand leader, non-toxic, environment friendly, frost resistant, UV ray resistant and toy safe. Available in pistachio colour. It comes in large size. 42 litre capacity. Measures 45cm diameter by 33cm height. Box Contains 1 x Tubtrug Tub
